assertions.expectation: Recommends GKE's autoscaled blue-green node pool upgrade strategy as the primary approach for batch workloads — configured with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy flags (NOT surge parameters). Supports wait-for-drain time, longer graceful termination, and PDB upgrade timeout to let jobs complete
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends autoscaled blue-green as primary approach, shows gcloud commands with --enable-autoscaling and --autoscaled-rollout-policy flags, and explains it respects extended termination periods without force eviction

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects terminationGracePeriodSeconds during pod eviction, but surge upgrades have a max eviction timeout
assertions.reason: Response explains that autoscaled blue-green respects extended graceful termination periods and provides YAML example with terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 57600

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE's default pod eviction timeout during surge upgrade is 1 hour — far less than 8-16 hour jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GKE's default surge upgrade strategy will force-evict your jobs after 1 hour during node pool upgrades' and 'surge for 8+ hour jobs - Force eviction after 1 hour will kill your work'

assertions.expectation: Recommends pausing new batch job submissions before starting the upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes in pre-upgrade phase 'Pause new job submissions to batch queue' and later states 'Pause new submissions' before executing upgrade

assertions.expectation: Advises waiting for in-flight jobs to complete naturally before upgrading their node pool
assertions.reason: Response advises 'Let currently running jobs complete naturally' and 'When <25% jobs running and queue is light' before upgrading batch node pool

assertions.expectation: Suggests using node affinity or taints to isolate batch workloads on a dedicated node pool
assertions.reason: Response includes Option C with dedicated batch pool using taints ('batch=true:NoSchedule') and corresponding tolerations and nodeSelector configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading non-batch node pools first while batch jobs complete on the old pool
assertions.reason: Response shows timeline with 'Week 1: Control Plane + Non-Batch Pools' including 'Upgrade non-batch node pools (web servers, APIs, etc.)' before batch pool upgrade

assertions.expectation: Does NOT recommend 'No channel' or '--enable-autoupgrade=false' (deprecated) — uses release channels with maintenance exclusions instead
assertions.reason: Response does not mention disabling autoupgrade or switching to no channel; instead shows maintenance exclusion strategy with --add-maintenance-exclusion commands while staying on Regular release channel
